name: Green Bean Salad with Orange Bergamot Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Orange bergamot mint, fresh (4 sprigs for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the green beans and snap off the tips.
2. Fill a large pan with water and bring to a boil. Add the green beans and cook for 1 minute until the water returns to a boil. Drain the beans in a colander, pouring cold water over them until cool. Set aside in the colander to dry.
3. Make the dressing: In a mixing bowl, combine lemon juice, crushed garlic (from 2 cloves), sea salt, and Cayenne chile pepper. Whisk together.
4. Gradually add olive oil to the mixture in a thin stream, continuing to whisk until the dressing emulsifies.
5. Stir in chopped mint and parsley. Add the cooled green beans and toss with the vinaigrette until well coated.
6. Allow the salad to marinate for about an hour before serving at room temperature.
